name: get_astronomy
description: Get sun rise/set times, moon rise/set times, moon phase, and solar position (altitude and azimuth) for a given location and date. Accepts coordinates, an IP address, or an address string to determine the location.

parameters.name: lat
parameters.description: Latitude coordinate. Must be used together with 'long'.

parameters.name: long
parameters.description: Longitude coordinate. Must be used together with 'lat'.

parameters.name: ip
parameters.description: IPv4 or IPv6 address to determine the location from.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Defaults to today.

parameters.name: elevation
parameters.description: Elevation above sea level in meters (0-10000). Default is 0.
